greeting: Hello! 👋 Welcome to {business_name}. How can I help you today?
ask_date: Great choice! 📅 What date would you like? (e.g. tomorrow, Monday, 15/06)
booking_rejected: 😔 Sorry, your booking request for {date} at {time} was not confirmed. Please try a different time.
outside_hours:
⏰ Sorry, we are closed at that time. Our working hours are:
{business_hours}
error_not_understood:
I'm sorry, I didn't understand that. 😕

Type *HELP* to see available options or *BOOK* to make a new booking.
help_message:
Here's what I can do:

📅 *BOOK* - Make a new booking
📋 *STATUS* - Check your booking
❌ *CANCEL* - Cancel a booking

Or just type what you need!
closed_today: 🚫 We are closed today. Our next opening is {next_open}.
cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel booking {booking_ref}? Reply *YES* to confirm.
reschedule_ask: When would you like to reschedule your booking? Please provide a new date and time.
invalid_date: I couldn't understand that date. Please try again (e.g. tomorrow, Monday, 15/06).
invalid_time: I couldn't understand that time. Please try again (e.g. 10:00, 2pm, 14:00).
